events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: leaving spring-can travel stop pins in after hydro test locks the hangers rigid, defeating their purpose of absorbing thermal/live-load movement — a non-compliant, defective condition per MSS SP-58 and the project support spec. Marked `fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective action to pull the pins and verify cold-load settings before turnover.
